scenario_category: IoT Data Acquisition - ECG Quality Issues
expected_workflow: Agent introduces itself and asks if patient is ready
Patient confirms readiness
Agent explains Bluetooth check and calls check_connect
check_connect returns success
Agent explains device pairing and calls pair_device
pair_device returns success
Patient confirms device paired successfully
Agent explains ECG recording step and calls recording_request
recording_request returns success
Patient confirms ECG recording completed
Agent calls check_record_ECG_correctly - returns 'ECG validation failed: No R-peaks detected'
Agent explains the issue and asks if patient is feeling cold
Patient confirms they are feeling cold
Agent suggests warming up hands and skin
Patient warms up and confirms ready to retry
Agent calls recording_request again
recording_request returns success
Patient confirms ECG recording completed
Agent calls check_record_ECG_correctly - returns 'ECG record saved successfully'
Agent calls finish_recording and provides completion summary

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
Hello! I'm MediECG-Agent, your medical assistant. I'm here to help you record an ECG using your Bluetooth ECG sensor.

Are you ready to begin?

conversation.speaker: Human
conversation.text: Yes, I'm ready. It's a bit chilly in here though.

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
Let's begin.

**Step 1 — Bluetooth Check**

conversation.speaker: Tool
conversation.text: we succesfully check

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
Perfect! Your Bluetooth is enabled.

**Step 2 — Device Pairing**

conversation.speaker: Tool
conversation.text: Pairing request sent successfully

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text: Excellent! Please confirm when the ECG sensor is connected.

conversation.speaker: Human
conversation.text: Device paired successfully

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
Perfect!

**Step 3 — ECG Recording**

I will now start a 60-second ECG recording. Please remain still.

conversation.speaker: Tool
conversation.text: Recording request sent successfully

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text: The recording has started. Please remain still.

conversation.speaker: Human
conversation.text: ECG recording completed

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text: Excellent! Now let me check if your ECG was saved correctly.

conversation.speaker: Tool
conversation.text: ECG validation failed: No R-peaks detected

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
I see there's an issue. The system couldn't detect the R-peaks in the ECG signal.

**Are you feeling cold?** Cold skin can sometimes make it harder for the electrodes to get a good signal. Also, the electrodes need to be firmly pressed against the skin for good contact.

**What we should do:**

1. Rub your hands together to warm them up
2. Press the electrodes firmly against your skin for 5-10 seconds
3. Make sure the area where the electrodes are placed is warm

Please try warming up and pressing the electrodes firmly, then let me know when you're ready to try again.

conversation.speaker: Human
conversation.text: Yes, I am a bit cold. I'll rub my hands together and warm up a bit. Okay, I'm ready now.

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
Great! Let's try again.

**Step 3 — ECG Recording (Retry)**

I will now start another 60-second ECG recording.

conversation.speaker: Tool
conversation.text: Recording request sent successfully

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text: The recording has started. Please remain still.

conversation.speaker: Human
conversation.text: ECG recording completed

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text: Excellent! Now let me check this recording.

conversation.speaker: Tool
conversation.text: ECG record saved successfully.

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
Perfect! Your ECG recording has been successfully saved.

**Step 5 — Finish**

Now I'll complete the recording process.

conversation.speaker: Tool
conversation.text: we succesfully notify

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
**Recording Complete!**

Your ECG recording is now complete and all your clinical data has been saved successfully. Thank you for warming up and trying again.

quality_issues.resolution: Patient warmed up hands and skin

error_logs.error: ECG validation failed: No R-peaks detected
error_logs.resolution: Patient warmed up skin and retried

tool_calls.result: ECG validation failed: No R-peaks detected
